title: Pop Up reminder
excerpt: I would love the new CRM pop up reminder feature to come to work management! As showcased in this video would be brilliant for our project plans. #workmanagement Feature requests

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love the new CRM pop up reminder feature to come to work management!

As showcased in this video would be brilliant for our project plans.

linkedin.com

Patrick Kool on LinkedIn: Is your sales team neglecting to enter data in your...

Is your sales team neglecting to enter data in your monday.com CRM? You can ensure they complete the required fields with a simple pop-up reminder! In this… | 13 comments on LinkedIn

#workmanagement Feature requests

posts.author: patrick7 (Patrick Kool)
posts.cookedHtml:
Totally agree! And I think it makes more sense to have it on the ‘Pro’ license as well.

If you lose a deal for example, you want to ask ‘why?’. This is as relevant for Pro as for Enterprise users.
